hero.title: Manage Your
hero.subtitle: A complete Fuel Inventory Management System for gas stations — from stock tracking to sales reports, everything in your hands.

features.title: Powerful Tools for Your Station
features.subtitle: Everything you need to run a gas station efficiently and profitably.

inventory.title: Inventory Management
inventory.desc: Track fuel stock in real-time — Regular, Super, Diesel, and Gas types.

sales.title: Sales Records
sales.desc: Log each sale and know exactly who sold how much — clear and smart.

reports.title: Stock Reports
reports.desc: Crystal-clear income, expense, and stock reports to power your decisions.

staff.title: Staff Management
staff.desc: Grant staff access and monitor their sales and activity.

multiAuth.title: Multiple Sign-in Methods
multiAuth.desc: Register/login with Google, Facebook, phone number, or email + OTP.

mobile.title: Mobile & Web
mobile.desc: Use on Android/iOS or desktop — one unified system, always in sync.

fuelTypes.title: Manage Any Fuel Type
fuelTypes.subtitle: System creates default fuel types on registration, and you can add more.

howItWorks.title: Get Started in 3 Steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up with Google, Facebook, phone, or email — default fuel types created automatically.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Manage incoming stock, log sales records, and add staff members.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Monitor your station's performance — export Excel reports (Pro plan).

pricing.title: Plans for Every Station
pricing.subtitle: Start free today — 3 months full access, then just $10/mo.

download.title: Download Kot Preng Now
download.subtitle: Available on Android, iOS, and Web — completely free to start.
